title: Port of LA faces 3-day backlog due to equipment failure
description: Logistics companies are rerouting vessels as the Port of Los Angeles struggles with equipment shortages, leading to a 3-day berthing delay.

title: Suez Canal traffic resumes after brief grounding incident
description: A container ship briefly ran aground in the Suez Canal, causing a short delay before being refloated by tugboats. No major impact expected.

title: Typhoon approaching South China Sea, threatening key shipping lanes
description: A major typhoon is projected to hit the South China Sea this weekend, authorities advise vessels to reroute or anchor safely.

title: Freight rates drop slightly despite ongoing Red Sea disruptions
description: Global container freight rates have stabilized this week, although major carriers continue to avoid the Red Sea route due to security concerns.
